error_signature: endless loop begins after the first loop
title: Endless loop in Loop Over Items node
symptom: When using the Loop Over Items node, an endless loop occurs after the first iteration, causing only the first URL to be executed repeatedly.
not_this_if: The workflow is correctly configured with matching item counts
root_cause: The Loop Over Items node may be receiving an unexpected number of items due to the Insert node adding additional items to the output. This mismatch can cause the loop to not function as intended, leading to repeated executions of the same item.
fix_steps: Check the output of the Insert node to ensure it matches the expected number of items.
Adjust the configuration of the Insert node to prevent it from adding extra items.
Add an empty node after the Loop Over Items node to stabilize the output.
agent_instruction: Ensure the Insert node does not alter the item count and add an empty node after the loop.
